message:
refactor(signal): migrate graceful shutdown logging to tracing_compat macros

Replace direct `tracing::info!` and `tracing::warn!` calls with the
project's `tracing_compat` re-exported `info!` and `warn!` macros.
This ensures graceful shutdown logging goes through the unified
tracing compatibility layer, consistent with the rest of the codebase,
and allows the compat shim to intercept or transform log output
(e.g. for WASM or no-std targets) without requiring per-callsite changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
